case_title: BRENT TYLER NORTH VS. HUY QUOC NGO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NORTH, BRENT TYLER AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, HUY QUOC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
